params.name: Philosophie Zoologique
params.description: In this book, Lamarck proposed an explanation of species feature changes based on environmental influences, challenging many traditional biological classification and inheritance concepts of the time. He explained how biological forms and habits gradually changed with environmental shifts, paving the way for understanding the principles of biological diversity.
